title: Building a Research Agent with Web Search and Synthesis
summary: Separate research from writing, return a structured brief, detect overlap with existing posts, and keep a human review checkpoint before drafting.

title: Microsoft Agent Framework overview
summary: Use agents for open-ended tasks and workflows for explicit multi-step orchestration with checkpointing and human-in-the-loop support.

title: Web Search tool for Agent Framework
summary: Give agents access to fresh web information while keeping security, privacy, and provider support in mind.

title: .NET AI ecosystem tools and SDKs
summary: Explains where Microsoft Agent Framework fits relative to Microsoft.Extensions.AI and other .NET AI building blocks.

title: Building a Reviewer Agent with a Scoring Rubric
summary: A reviewer agent works better when the pipeline already has a structured artifact to validate instead of a loose draft.

title: Security and privacy considerations for web search tools
summary: Treat web results as untrusted input, avoid sending secrets, and plan for result variability and rate limits.
